arts.ttl: Kyle Walker in line for huge Saudi contract as Man City put modest price tag on 34-year-old
arts.sum: Kyle Walker could be playing his final season at Manchester City. The 34-year-old is out of contract at the Etihad in 2026 and is unlikely to be offered a renewed deal. Despite coming close to joining Bayern Munich nearly 18 months ago, the rapid full-back remains a City player, but for how much longer?
